top_signals.title: Oman, Iran Discuss Managing Strait of Hormuz Navigation
top_signals.summary: Oman and Iran agreed on Tuesday to press on with discussions about the future administration of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz, including maritime services in the strategic waterway and the costs associated with them.In a joint statement issued after talks in Muscat…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CFTC chair says perp trading not suitable for all assets it regulates
top_signals.summary: Michael Selig told US cotton producers that the agency’s regulatory approach to crypto perpetual futures may not be a “natural fit for traditional commodity markets, like agriculture.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Advertising at World Cup: Levi’s genius, hydration breaks and dodging rules
top_signals.summary: This World Cup, now well under way, has been dominated not only by the action on the pitch but how much brands are spending off it. An estimated $10bn is being splurged by some of the world’s most recognisable organisations on adverts and campaigns, while some firms are milking the World Cup for free advertising [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Exclusive | Charles Schwab Breaks Into the Prediction Market Business  WSJ
